name: Container Use
description: MCP server that gives coding agents isolated containerised environments in separate git branches, enabling multiple agents to work safely in parallel without conflicts.

skills.name: Isolated Agent Environment
skills.description: Spin up a fresh container in a dedicated git branch so each coding agent operates independently without touching shared working state.

skills.name: Parallel Agent Execution
skills.description: Run multiple coding agents simultaneously, each in its own container, then inspect command history and logs for each agent's work.

skills.name: Safe Environment Discard
skills.description: Instantly destroy a failed agent's container and branch without any impact on the main codebase or other running agents.
